title: Login page not loading
description: User cannot access the login page from the homepage.

title: Payment gateway error
description: Payment fails during checkout using credit card.

title: Profile image upload issue
description: Users are unable to upload profile images.

title: Dashboard data not updating
description: Statistics on the dashboard are not refreshing automatically.

title: Forgot password email not sent
description: Users are not receiving password reset emails.

title: Search functionality slow
description: Search results take too long to load.

title: Mobile layout broken
description: UI elements overlap on smaller screen devices.

title: Notification not working
description: Users are not receiving system notifications.

title: Order history missing
description: Past orders are not showing in the user dashboard.

title: API response delay
description: Backend API takes too long to respond.
